---
title: "Open Source AI Systems"
subtitle: "A branded Quarto starter deck"
author: "Eduardo J. Barrios"
date: "2026-06-29"
format:
  edujbarrios-revealjs:
    slide-number: c/t
    show-slide-number: all
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    code-copy: true
---

## Why This Theme?

::: {.eyebrow}
edujbarrios.com inspired
:::

This deck turns the site branding into a reusable **open-source Quarto theme**:
dark surfaces, <span class="accent">turquoise signals</span>,
<span class="violet">violet depth</span>, and
<span class="orange">warm highlights</span>.

::: {.tag-list}
::: {.tag}
Revealjs
:::
::: {.tag}
Quarto
:::
::: {.tag}
MIT
:::
::: {.tag}
Open Source
:::
:::

## Project Snapshot

::: {.three-column}
::: {.metric}
<span class="value">10+</span>
<span class="label">AI projects</span>
:::

::: {.metric}
<span class="value">3+</span>
<span class="label">LLM systems</span>
:::

::: {.metric}
<span class="value">2</span>
<span class="label">publications</span>
:::
:::

## Narrative Cards

::: {.two-column}
::: {.brand-card}
### Engineering

Use this card for architectural claims, roadmaps, and product strategy.
The border and glow stay close to the website's hero cards.
:::

::: {.brand-card}
### Research

Pair concise text with technical details, equations, or examples without
making the slide feel like a plain document.
:::
:::

## Code

```python
def retrieve_then_generate(query, retriever, model):
    context = retriever.search(query, top_k=5)
    return model.generate(
        system="Answer from the retrieved context.",
        user={"query": query, "context": context},
    )
```

## Callout

::: {.callout-note}
The theme intentionally uses system fonts and local SCSS so it remains fully
open source and easy to fork.
:::

## Section Divider {.section-title}

## Closing

::: {.eyebrow}
Ship the deck
:::

Use `format: edujbarrios-revealjs` after installing the extension with
`quarto add edujbarrios/edujbarrios-slide`.
